scored_papers.title: Quantum Uncertainty and Entropy
scored_papers.abstract: We review the plethora of uncertainty relations that appear in quantum mechanics and their nuances. We present both foundational applications, e.g. in understanding and defining complementarity, and practical applications, e.g. in quantum metrology and cryptography. Both variance- and entropy-based uncertainties are covered here.
scored_papers.reason: 📏✨ 量子不確定性関係の包括的レビュー！分散型・エントロピー型の両アプローチで相補性・QSL・時間演算子の背景理論が整理されてる🎯
scored_papers.summary: 量子力学の不確定性関係を包括的にレビュー。Robertson型・Mandelstam-Tamm型・エントロピー型の各アプローチと量子計測論への応用を体系的に解説。

scored_papers.title: Wave packet motion in a quantized electromagnetic field: Analytic results
scored_papers.abstract: We investigate the dynamics of a charged particle interacting with a multimode quantized electromagnetic field and obtain an analytic solution for the full electron--field system. This framework enables the calculation of position expectation values and uncertainties for arbitrary wave packets and field states, allowing us to identify quantum corrections to the corresponding classical motion. While the corrections to the position expectation value are weak and largely insensitive to the quantum state of the field, the wave packet broadening exhibits a pronounced dependence on the field state. In particular, the quantum uncertainty of the radiation is directly imprinted onto the spatial uncertainty of the particle. We illustrate these effects for Gaussian wave packets interacting with coherent, Fock, and squeezed states, including bright squeezed vacuum. The interaction with a finite-duration laser pulse is also analyzed as a multimode example. Our results provide a transparent analytic route toward understanding how quantum fluctuations of light influence electron dynamics in strong-field settings.
scored_papers.reason: 🌊⚡ 量子化電磁場中の波束ダイナミクスを解析的に完全解！位置期待値・不確定性の量子補正を波束形式で精確に計算できる枠組み✨
scored_papers.summary: 多モード量子電磁場中の荷電粒子波束の全系解析解を構築。任意の波束・場状態での位置期待値・不確定性の量子補正を厳密に計算可能。

scored_papers.title: Relativistic single-electron wavepacket in quantum electromagnetic fields II: Quantum radiation emitted by a uniformly accelerated electron
scored_papers.abstract: We compute the quantum radiation emitted by wavepackets of relativistic single electrons, both at rest and undergoing uniform acceleration in the Minkowski vacuum of the electromagnetic field. We find that the cubic terms in the original nonlinear action of electrodynamics should be considered in obtaining the quantum radiation to the leading order. We show that the quantum radiation from a single-electron wavepacket at rest vanishes exactly. For a uniformly accelerated electron, the quantum radiated power has secular growth in the long-time regime. We demonstrate that this secular growth has a classical interpretation, and argue that the resummed quantum radiation at late times would not diverge. Regarding experimental proposals for the detection of the Unruh effect from the quantum radiation in the `blind spots' of classical radiation we ascertain that quantum corrections in the two blind spots are fully contributed by the transverse deviation correlators, where the dominant contributions are irrelevant to the Unruh effect in electron microscopes.
scored_papers.reason: 🚀 相対論的電子波束のUnruh放射を波束形式で厳密計算！波束×相対論的QED×量子測定の交差点を探る先進的アプローチ✨
scored_papers.summary: 均一加速度運動する相対論的電子波束の量子輻射をQEDで計算。3次非線形項が必須と判明し、熱的プランク分布再現の可能性も示す。
